acceptance_targets: [chapter_04_booker_01] Pass if a reader can point to at least one explicit technical or professional setback for June in the revised passage anchored near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:323 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:365 and explain how Leela's choice caused or materially worsened it without having to infer the link. Fail if June's cost is still conveyed only through angry texts, scheduler screenshots, or accusation.

[chapter_04_craft_01] Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:327, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:339, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:359 changes Leela's options or stakes in a way not already established at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:107, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:117, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:163. Fail if the call still mainly repeats Mohit's earlier language about framing, scope, and June being secondary.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader can point to at least one explicit technical or professional setback for June in the revised passage anchored near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:323 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:365 and explain how Leela's choice caused or materially worsened it without having to infer the link. Fail if June's cost is still conveyed only through angry texts, scheduler screenshots, or accusation.
findings.problem: The chapter clearly lands Leela's ethical failure, but June's direct technical loss stays partly inferential. After repeated requests for node C and the hash script, the text mostly gives us texts and scheduler status rather than one concrete on-page failure caused by Leela's refusal, so the promised consequence reads more as Leela's guilt than as fully dramatized material harm to June.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the late submission lead-up around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:323 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:365 so June's damage becomes materially legible before the upload at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:391. Put one specific loss on the page: a failed check that the withheld script would have narrowed, a missed meeting consequence, or a run that dies because Leela keeps the block live.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:327, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:339, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:359 changes Leela's options or stakes in a way not already established at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:107, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:117, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:163. Fail if the call still mainly repeats Mohit's earlier language about framing, scope, and June being secondary.
findings.problem: Mohit's morning phone call largely restates an argument the office scene has already won: scoped claim over broader truth, submission over scruple, June as collateral. Because the later scene adds little new leverage until the very end, the final act loses some escalation and starts to feel rhetorically repetitive.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:327 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:359 so the call either introduces a genuinely new pressure vector or gets compressed. If you keep the scene, make Mohit force a fresh choice that was not already established in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:117 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:163, rather than rephrasing the same scope-versus-integrity logic.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the absurdity and cruelty of graduate labor without converting the book into caricature or chase-plot menace. In edge cases, prefer the messier and more compromising version of events if it yields stronger human consequence and remains causally plausible; render sex, professional theft, bureaucratic harm, and emotional pettiness with the same specificity as any technical problem.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns vague at the exact point humiliation, erotic charge, class shame, visa fear, or institutional cruelty becomes concrete, rewrite until the cost is materially and socially legible.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High; contractions are the baseline in speech, and uncontracted forms should appear only for deliberate precision, class performance, emotional emphasis, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public and private pressure, ensemble chapters and solitary ones, bureaucratic scenes and domestic scenes, deadline compression and aftermath inventory, so no two adjacent chapters rely on the same structural rhythm or dialogue density.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary literary English grounded in material detail; technical language should appear only when the social reality of the lab requires it, and it should never replace bodily or relational consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person centered on Leela, with occasional brief widenings that register group mood and institutional atmosphere without leaving her interpretive frame.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed observational lines with longer accrual sentences that can carry comedy, shame, and procedural dread in the same movement; quiet chapters should breathe, deadline chapters should tighten without turning telegraphic.
